form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 3rd in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win on April 14 over 400m at this track behind Sailor Song beaten 4 lengths (22.89). Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 400m at this track in a handy 22.58 beating Snapper Head. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time. Worth following up.
